top_signals.title: Revenue for Russian LNG Exports Decreases as Shift to Asia Doubles Costs
top_signals.summary: Russia's diversification of its liquefied natural gas exports to Asia after the loss of the European market will cut its revenue due to at least a doubling of logistics costs, industry sources and analysts told Reuters.The European Union plans…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
